title: A Wizard of Earthsea
description: A young wizard named Ged learns the cost of power in the archipelago of Earthsea when he unleashes a nameless shadow upon the world.

title: The Left Hand of Darkness
description: An envoy from the interplanetary League navigates the ambisexual society of an icebound planet called Winter.

title: And Then There Were None
description: Ten strangers are lured to a remote island and murdered one by one in accordance with an old nursery rhyme.

title: The Murder at the Vicarage
description: The first Miss Marple novel, in which the resourceful spinster solves a murder in the village of St. Mary Mead.

title: A Taste for Death
description: Commander Adam Dalgliesh investigates a double murder discovered in a London vestry, involving a government minister.

title: An Unsuitable Job for a Woman
description: Young detective Cordelia Gray takes over a Cambridge investigation into a student's apparent suicide.

title: A Judgement in Stone
description: A functionally illiterate housekeeper carries out a terrible act to hide her secret from an upper-class English family.

title: The Wexford Stories
description: A collection of stories featuring Chief Inspector Reginald Wexford of Kingsmarkham, Ruth Rendell's long-running detective.

title: The Thursday Murder Club
description: Four unlikely friends in a retirement village meet weekly to puzzle over unsolved murders until a real body turns up on their doorstep.

title: The Man Who Died Twice
description: Joyce, Elizabeth, Ron, and Ibrahim are back and drawn into a web involving stolen diamonds and a man who apparently died twice.

title: Excellent Women
description: Mildred Lathbury, an excellent woman in postwar London, observes the romantic entanglements of her neighbours with wry detachment.

title: A Glass of Blessings
description: Wilmet Forsyth, a restless young woman in 1950s London, finds her ordered life quietly disrupted by the people around her.

title: The Bookshop
description: Florence Green opens a bookshop in a small English seaside town, facing quiet but implacable opposition from local powers.

title: Offshore
description: A group of misfits live on houseboats on the Thames, caught between the security of land and the freedom of the water. Booker Prize winner.

title: Lessons in Chemistry
description: A female chemist in 1960s California becomes an unlikely television cooking show host, challenging the era's expectations of women.

title: The Dark Is Rising
description: On his eleventh birthday Will Stanton discovers he is the last of the Old Ones, destined to seek the six Signs of the Light against the Dark.

title: The Grey King
description: Will Stanton travels to Wales in the fourth book of The Dark Is Rising sequence to seek the golden harp and awaken the Sleepers.

title: Wolf Hall
description: Thomas Cromwell's rise from blacksmith's son to the most powerful man in Henry VIII's England, told in vivid present-tense prose.

title: The Remains of the Day
description: Stevens, the perfect English butler, drives through the countryside reflecting on his years of service and the roads not taken.

title: Crow Lake
description: A professor of zoology returns to her childhood home in rural Ontario and confronts the family tragedy that shaped her life.
